luxe.living.daily.display_name: Luxe Living Daily (rebranded from purchased account)

last_7d.data_freshness_note: Studio session live as @luxe.living.daily on Skylar Chrome browser. Numbers fresh. The +1,472.8% view spike is the algorithm responding to the V1-V3 native 9:16 LLD posts that started firing 5/7 evening (V1 11:45 AM 5/7, V2 6 PM 5/7, V3 9 AM 5/8) plus the 12 newly-scheduled posts setting up consistent cadence.

public_profile_check_2026_05_09.bio: Luxury home inspo daily ✨ kitchens · spas · closets 🕯️ shop below 👇
public_profile_check_2026_05_09.note: Followers + likes flat day-over-day at 16.3K / 108.6K despite +1,472% view spike in 7d window. Algorithm pushing impressions to non-followers but conversion to follow is still anemic. Bio link points to root index, not /lld.html — minor concern: could route LLD viewers to non-LLD content. Verify on next session.

luxe.living.daily.delta_vs_prior_check: Video views 994 → 1,600 (+606 in 24h, +61% intraday). FYP share: 91.1% → 94.2% (+3.1pt — algo pushing harder to non-followers). Likes 6 → 8 (+2). Profile views 4 → 6 (+2). Followers + total likes UNCHANGED at 16.3K / 108.6K. The growth is in distribution not retention.
luxe.living.daily.note: MAJOR ALGO LIFT IN PROGRESS. 12 freshly-scheduled posts (5-day runway Mon 5/11 → Fri 5/15) will keep the FYP loop fed. Profile-view CTR still anemic at 0.40%. Bio link clicks ~zero. Risk: if cadence drops over weekend, the lift evaporates.

studio_dashboard_2026_05_09.note: First non-zero 7d window for Fuzzy. 112 views from V1-V2 native posts firing 5/7-5/8 + scheduled cadence. 99.1% FYP — TikTok algo testing this content cold from zero followers. Watch 24h delta — should accelerate as V3+ scheduled posts fire.

public_profile_check_2026_05_09.bio: Cute pets that don't exist (yet) 🐾 AI-made art · shop pet picks ↓
public_profile_check_2026_05_09.note: Followers still 0, likes still 2 — same as 5/8. Public profile unchanged but Studio shows 112 views materializing. Cold-start: impressions arriving, no conversion yet. Video grid still not rendering on public profile (TikTok intermittent issue, not a profile problem).

fuzzy_frames_ai.delta_vs_prior_check: 7d Studio video views 0 → 112 (first non-zero window). Likes 0 → 1. Public profile followers + likes flat at 0 / 2.

summary_today: LLD: +1,472.8% 7d views (1.6K), 8 likes, but follower count flat — algo distribution surge with weak conversion. Fuzzy: first non-zero 7d window (112 views), proving content is reaching FYP from cold start.
